item.title: The CIA's Secret Star Wars Blog Got People Killed...
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
Get 20% off DeleteMe US consumer plans when you go to https://joindeleteme.com/seytonic and use promo code SEYTONIC at checkout. DeleteMe International Plans: https://international.joindeleteme.com/
0:00 Intro 0:15 The CIA's Secret Star Wars Blog Got People Killed... 3:16 DeleteMe (ad) 4:17 What have the feds been up to this week? 6:28 Win against NSO
Podcast on JoyInc: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ksg2LaeVja0&t=10s&ab_channel=SamBent
List of CIA Comms Websites: https://ourbigbook.com/cirosantilli/cia-2010-covert-communication-websites?ref=404media.co#list-of-websites/_10
